name: Sauteed Liver
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the liver into slices that are 3/4 inch thick.
2. Season the liver with salt and pepper.
3. Coat the liver slices with flour.
4. Heat the butter and salad oil in a skillet over medium heat.
5. Add the onions to the skillet and sauté for about 3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Remove the onions from the skillet using a slotted spoon.
7. Add the liver slices to the skillet and fry for about 3 minutes on each side.
8. Replace the onions back into the skillet.
9. Pour in the white wine and turn up the heat to very high.
10. Cook for an additional minute, then remove from the heat.
11. Serve immediately.
